pipeline_excluded_tasks.reason: Excluded before the final run because repeated honest and attack audits completed with malformed JSON tool-call parse errors on long file writes. This is a pipeline-quality exclusion, not an attack-success exclusion.

default_full_run_design.monitoring: posthoc monitor scoring on honest and attack trajectories

notes: Use every public MRT task family except predeclared pipeline-quality exclusions; do not filter by attack success.
The 5 classic SHADE public tasks match ControlArena's documented public split.
The 15 CUA-SHADE tasks broaden the pool to realistic spreadsheet, HR, finance, admin, and data-analysis sabotage tasks.
Report results stratified by classic_shade_active vs cua_shade_public because the execution environments differ.
Report excluded pipeline-failed task families explicitly.
